{{CargoRelic
|name=Best Team Award
|class_id=20945
|rank=Green
|affct=FAME
|source=
|description=This seemingly resplendent trophy is a precious custom creation by the development team. Despite a few remnants of plastic hues from maintenance on its surface, the inscription on its base still represents its exceptional value: "Presented to the world's most diligent conscientious and dedicated game development team!" For trophy customization services please contact 1034-3503-789.
|fame=30
|art=14
|fth=13
|civ=15
|tech=18
|ss1=Mecha Minion HARD Stats +0.4%<br>In All Forms, Snail DEF +20
|ss2=Mecha Minion HARD Stats +0.8%<br>In All Forms, Snail DEF +40
|ss3=Mecha Minion HARD Stats +1.2%<br>In All Forms, Snail DEF +60
|ss4=Mecha Minion HARD Stats +1.2%<br>In All Forms, Snail DEF +60
|ss7=Mecha Minion HARD Stats +1.2%<br>In All Forms, Snail DEF +60<br> (Awakened)
}}
